name: Orange Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the butter and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the melted oleo to the mixture and stir until incorporated.
3. Gradually add the crushed vanilla wafers, thawed frozen orange juice, and chopped pecans to the mixture. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Roll the mixture into small balls using a spoon or your hands.
5. Roll each ball in Bakers Angel Flake Coconut until completely coated.
6. Place the coconut-coated balls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
7. Refrigerate for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld and the coating to set.
Marylee Granberry
